description: m3ter is a usage-based pricing, metering, and billing platform. It lets organizations configure billing entities and submit usage measurements for ingestion and rating.
summary: m3ter exposes two authenticated REST APIs for developers: a Config API at `https://api.m3ter.com` and an Ingest API at `https://ingest.m3ter.com`, both using OAuth2 client-credentials bearer tokens minted from service-user access keys.
